summary: Caller reported water leakage in washroom at Kuisekatu 2, Mäntylä, apartment 1375. Master key permitted. Work order WO-2501 created and assigned to Pekka Puupää for Tuesday, 9:00 AM. SMS confirmation sent to caller.

message: Work order WO-2501 created for Kuisekatu 2, Mäntylä, apartment 1375: water leakage in washroom. Assigned technician: Pekka Puupää. Scheduled time: Tuesday, 9:00 AM. Master key use permitted. We will contact you if anything changes.

original_email.subject: Urgent: Water leak in apartment B12, Hämeentie 23
original_email.body:
Hello,

I am writing to report a water leak under the kitchen sink in my apartment.

Address: Hämeentie 23, Helsinki
Apartment: B12
Problem: There is a slow but constant drip coming from under the kitchen sink. The pipe connection seems to be loose. I've placed a bucket under it but it fills up every few hours.

The master key can be used to enter my apartment.
Please note: I have a cat, so please be careful when opening the door.

I am available Monday–Friday between 8:00 and 17:00.

Best regards,
Liisa Virtanen
Phone: +358 40 888 1111

extracted_data.issue_description: There is a slow but constant drip coming from under the kitchen sink. The pipe connection seems to be loose. I've placed a bucket under it but it fills up every few hours.
extracted_data.special_notes: a cat, so please be careful when opening the door; Availability: Monday–Friday between 8:00 and 17:00

summary: Caller reported cold radiator in apartment A3 at Mannerheimintie 10. Master key permitted. Dog in apartment noted.

transcript.text: Welcome to Property Maintenance Support. How can I assist you today?
Hi, I need to report a heating issue in my apartment.
I'd be happy to help. Can you tell me the address of your property?
Great, I see Matti Meikäläinen handles maintenance for Mannerheimintie 10. Is the issue in a common area or your apartment?
What seems to be the problem?
The living room radiator is completely cold. I think there might be an air pocket.
Is the use of a master key permitted to access your apartment?
Anything special to take into account?
I have a friendly golden retriever, please ring the bell first.
Got it. Let me confirm: Mannerheimintie 10, apartment A3, cold radiator with possible air pocket, master key permitted, dog in apartment. Your phone number is +358 40 555 1234. Is this correct?
I've created work order WO-9842 and assigned it to Matti Meikäläinen. He'll arrive today at 2:00 PM. You'll receive an SMS confirmation shortly.

message: Your maintenance request WO-9842 has been registered. Technician Matti Meikäläinen will arrive today at 2:00 PM at Mannerheimintie 10, Apt A3. Issue: Cold radiator. — Kiinteistö-Agent

summary: Caller reported flickering stairwell light on 2nd floor at Runeberginkatu 5. Common area issue. Door code provided.

transcript.text: Welcome to Property Maintenance Support. How can I assist you today?
There's a light that keeps flickering in the stairwell.
I can help with that. What's the address?
Is this a common area issue or in a specific apartment?
It's in the common area, second floor stairwell.
Understood. The main entrance — is there a door code?
Work order WO-9839 has been created. Pekka Puupää will handle it tomorrow at 10:00 AM.
